name: Animal
summary: You can speak with and befriend animals with ease. In addition, you treat Knowledge (nature) as a class skill.

granted_power_l1.name: Speak with Animals
granted_power_l1.summary: You can speak with animals, as per the spell, for a number of rounds per day equal to 3 + your cleric level. (For druids: 3 + druid level.)

higher_level_powers.summary: Gain an animal companion using cleric-level - 3 / druid-level as effective druid level.
